codeReview.summary: The orchestration layer now resolves authoritative linked counts during planning, prefers those counts over supplemental snapshots for safe reused rounds, and keeps the no-op/rerun classification aligned with actual linked state discovered from review/resource surfaces.

summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and end-to-end orchestration changes for `mm-importer-end-to-end-orchestration` at commit `561d064d677f9ef7532c34606168a178d57a4ea6`. Result: pass. The linked-count resolver and existing-state merge logic improve dry-run/apply convergence without overriding authoritative reuse matching.
